instruction: Make the train door pale yellow again, remove the extra clock hand, and slide the blue poster back into line. The green signal should be green, the platform crack should follow its original shallow zigzag, and the passenger's bag should sit beside them again.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
